questionHtml:
Following heavy rain overnight, the gardener wished to determine whether the number of snails found in a random 12 m2 area of the park had increased.

State the hypotheses for the test.
markschemeHtml:
H0 : m=2.4,          A1

H1 : m>2.4          A1

 

Note: The hypotheses may be written in words but must include reference to the mean (e.g. “number of snails” is not sufficient to award A1), and state clearly for H1 that the mean increases.

 

[2 marks]

meta.title: State the hypotheses for the test.
breadcrumbLabels: SL 4.11—Expected, observed, hypotheses, chi squared, gof, t-test
